fields.returns: The number of coordinates written into <paramref name="coords" />.
fields.summary: Fills a span with the current normalized variation coordinates of the font.

params.coords: A span to receive the normalized variation coordinates in 2.14 fixed-point format.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates of the font using design-space values.

params.coords: A read-only span of design-space coordinate values, one per variation axis.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates of the font using pre-normalized values.

params.coords: A read-only span of normalized coordinate values in 2.14 fixed-point format, one per variation axis.

fields.summary: Sets the font's variation coordinates to match the specified named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance, as returned by <see cref="P:HarfBuzzSharp.Face.NamedInstanceCount" />.

fields.summary: Sets multiple variation axis values on the font.

params.variations: A read-only span of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.Variation" /> values specifying each axis tag and its desired value.

fields.value: An array of normalized variation coordinate values in 2.14 fixed-point format, one per variation axis, or an empty array if no variation coordinates are set.
fields.summary: Gets the current variation coordinates of the font in normalized form.
